problem_statement:
Given an array of N intervals in the form of (start[i], end[i]), where start[i] is the starting point of the interval and end[i] is the ending point of the interval, return the minimum number 
    of intervals that need to be removed to make the remaining intervals non-overlapping. .

examples.explanation: You can remove the interval [1, 3] to make the remaining intervals non-overlapping.
You can remove the intervals [1, 4] and [3, 5] to make the rest non-overlapping.
